reasoning: Bitcoin established its all-time high of approximately $109,000 in January 2025. Reports from early to mid-April 2025 indicate the price has been trading significantly lower, mostly in the $84,000 to $88,000 range. The Polymarket consensus for this event to happen was already down to 2% by April 17, reflecting the low probability of the price closing the massive $20,000+ gap to the ATH. With only three days remaining in April, absent any unprecedented catalyst, it is extremely unlikely that Bitcoin will experience the >25% sudden surge necessary to set a new all-time high before the end of the month.
